description: Large-context single-shot GPU-resident prefill check: a multi-thousand-token registry prompt with a planted secret, recalled greedily. Confirms the GPU prefill path engages and is correct at scale.
task: recall the planted secret passphrase from the long context
gpu_prefill_path: q8_0_cuda_resident_prefill (single-shot, one forward per token; resident in VRAM)
vram_note: On this RTX 3060 Laptop (6 GB), the engine sized the resident KV cap to 12633 positions (weights 1845 MiB + 229376 B/pos + 512 MiB headroom). Contexts up to ~12.6k tokens prefill GPU-resident; the mac bundle scale of 15373 tokens EXCEEDS this 6 GB card and would fall back to the CPU per-token beyond the cap by design. This is a VRAM ceiling of the 6 GB laptop card, not a correctness limit.
throughput_note: GPU single-shot prefill is one-forward-per-token (no batched prefill kernel), so ~5.9k tokens took ~188 s on this card; this is a TTFT/throughput characteristic, not a parity issue.
